chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-3527 of 2013 M/s Master Enterprises (Pvt.) Ltd and another Versus Securities & Exchange Commission of Pakistan and others DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). For hearing of main case..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 11.09.2024 Mr. Muhammad Umar Lakhani, Advocate for the petitioners..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Mr. Muhammad Umar Lakhani, learned counsel for petitioners submits that this petition has served its purpose as such he has been instructed not to press this petition. Dismissed as not pressed. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
